spells.description: Emberdawn conjures a flaming windstorm that inflicts $466888s2 Fire damage every $466888t2 sec to all players and pushes them for $d.
spells.name: Burning Gale

spells.description: Emberdawn pecks her current target, inflicting $s1 Physical damage and an additional $466091s1 Fire damage every $466091t1 sec for $466091d.
spells.name: Searing Beak

spells.description:
Emberdawn spits fire at a player, inflicting $466559s1 Fire damage every $466559t1 sec for $466559d. Upon expiration, the fire forms into a flaming patch that inflicts $472118s1 Fire damage every $472118t1 sec to players within it. 

The patch's central updraft inflicts $465957s1 Fire damage to players who touch it, knocking them away.
spells.name: Flaming Updraft

spells.description: Fiery remains inflict $472118s1 Fire damage every $472118t1 sec to players within. The patch's central updraft inflicts inflicts $465957s1 Fire damage to players who touch it, knocking them away.
spells.name: Ignited Embers

spells.description: $@spellname467120 react to the winds from $@spellname465904, ejecting fiery tornadoes that inflict $470212s1 Fire damage to players struck and stun players hit for $470212d before tossing them away.
spells.name: Flaming Twisters

spells.coaching_note: Emberdawn breathes a fire cone toward a player — clear the frontal.
spells.description: Emberdawn breathes a cone of fire towards a player, inflicting $s1 Fire damage to players hit.
spells.name: Fire Breath

spells.description: Emberdawn inflicts $s1 Fire damage to players within $A1 yards upon landing.
spells.name: Fiery Landing

spells.description: Kalis inflicts $s1 Shadow damage to a player.
spells.name: Shadow Bolt

spells.coaching_note: Kalis channels a stacking party-wide debuff that ramps everyone's damage taken (and chips Shadow each tick) — it can't be player-kicked; the ONLY stop is Latch's Heaving Yank hooking Kalis. Resolve that bait or the stacks keep climbing.
spells.description:
Kalis continually releases piercing shrieks, inflicting $1219491s1 Shadow damage to all players every $t1 sec and increasing their damage taken from $@spellname472736 by $1219491s2% for $1219491d. This effect stacks.

Latch's $@spellname472795 interrupts this ability.
spells.name: Debilitating Shriek

spells.coaching_note: Kalis and Latch are a pair — kill one and the survivor enrages, ramping its damage in stacking steps. Bring them down close together so the enraged window stays short.
spells.description: When either Kalis or Latch falls in battle, the other becomes incensed, increasing their damage done by $s1% every $1219554t1 sec.
spells.name: Broken Bond

spells.coaching_note: Curses random players — Dark Entities fixate on them. Answer in order: DECURSE it (removes the fixate); no curse-dispel in comp → CC the entities; no curse AND no CC up → the cursed player kites the entities away from the group.
spells.description: Kalis curses players, causing Dark Entities to fixate upon them for $1215803d.
spells.name: Curse of Darkness

spells.coaching_note: Latch bombards all players with bile impacts — spread so impacts don't overlap, then move out of them. Each forms a Gunk Splatter pool and applies the Splattered DoT.
spells.description:
Latch spews bile onto players, inflicting $472758s1 Nature damage to players within $472758A1 yards of each impact and applying $@spellname1282272.

$@spellname472777 forms at the impact locations.
spells.name: Splattering Spew

spells.coaching_note: Bile pools left by Splattering Spew — move out; standing in them also amplifies the damage you take from the next Splattering Spew.
spells.description: Latch's bile coats the ground, inflicting $s1 Nature damage every $t1 sec to players within it and increasing their damage taken from $@spellname472745 by $s3%.
spells.name: Gunk Splatter

spells.coaching_note: Latch hooks a RANDOM (non-tank) player and pulls the first thing the hook hits to him. The targeted player interposes Kalis so the hook catches KALIS instead — that interrupts Debilitating Shriek and you avoid the pull. Fail it and you're yanked in → Heaving Chop (stun) AND the Shriek keeps stacking.
spells.description: Latch throws a hook towards a player, pulling the first target hit to his location. If a player is struck, Latch follows up with $@spellname474075.
spells.name: Heaving Yank

spells.description: Latch chops his primary target, inflicting $474065s1 Physical damage every ${$t1}.2 sec for $d.
spells.name: Bone Hack

spells.description: Latch strikes the hooked player, inflicting $s1 Physical damage and stunning them for $d.
spells.name: Heaving Chop

spells.coaching_note: Kalis and Latch are a pair — kill one and the survivor enrages, ramping its damage in stacking steps. Bring them down close together so the enraged window stays short.
spells.description: When either Kalis or Latch falls in battle, the other becomes incensed, increasing their damage done by $s1% every $1219554t1 sec.
spells.name: Broken Bond

spells.description: Latch's bile inflicts $1282272s1 Nature damage to players hit every $1282272t1 sec for $1282272d.
spells.name: Splattered

spells.description: Commander Kroluk focuses his destructive urge on his current target, repeatedly thrashing them and inflicting $467621s1 Physical damage every $t1 sec for $d.
spells.name: Rampage

spells.description: The Haunting Grunt charges toward their current target and inflicts $s2 Physical damage.
spells.name: Intercepting Charge

spells.description: Commander Kroluk unleashes a bloodthirsty warcry, inflicting $468221s1 Physical damage to all players and summoning a warparty to fight alongside him.
spells.name: Rallying Bellow

spells.coaching_note: Kroluk fixates a random player and spins toward them, damaging anyone within range until his warparty is dead — the fixated player baits him AWAY from the group while everyone else clears the spin's path.
spells.description:
$?diff16[The Kroluk concentrates his bestial urge, spins around in a circle, and starts a merciless pursuit of a random player, inflicting $468924s1 Physical damage every $468924t1 sec and additional $1251589s1 Physical damage every $1251589t1 sec for $1251589d. 

The Kroluk never ceases, until every summoned minion lies broken at his feet.][Commander Kroluk enters a battle-trance, fixating on a player and inflicting $468924s1 Physical damage every $468924t1 sec to players within $s2 yards.

Commander Kroluk continues to $@spellname470963 until his warparty is defeated.]
spells.name: Bladestorm

spells.coaching_note: Kroluk leaps to the furthest player and slams an AoE (+ DoT) at the impact — clear the landing radius. The impact also shakes loose Falling Rubble.
spells.description:
Commander Kroluk recklessly leaps towards the furthest player, inflicting $472054s1 Physical damage and an additional $472054s2 Physical damage every $472054t2 sec for $472054d to players within $472054A1 yards of the impact location. 

The force of the impact causes $@spellname1283357.
spells.name: Reckless Leap

spells.description: Commander Kroluk's manifestation inflicts $s1 Arcane damage to players within $A1 yards, knocking them away.
spells.name: Violent Manifestation

spells.description: The Spectral Axethrower throws an axe at a player, inflicting $s1 Physical damage and causing them to bleed for $s2 Physical damage every $t2 sec for $d.
spells.name: Throw Axe

spells.description: Commander Kroluk fortifies himself, reducing his damage taken by 99%.
spells.name: Shield Wall

spells.description: The Phantasmal Mystic sends lightning into a player, inflicting $s1 Nature damage. The lightning then jumps to the closest other player.
spells.name: Chain Lightning

spells.description: Commander Kroluk bellows an intimidating shout, causing players who stand alone to run in fear and suffer $1253030s2 Shadow damage every $1253030t2 sec for $1253030d.
spells.name: Intimidating Shout

spells.description: The Phantasmal Mystic unleashes a nova of flame, inflicting $s1 Fire damage to all players.
spells.name: Flame Nova

spells.coaching_note: Debris shaken loose by Reckless Leap — rains down in patches; move out of the impacts.
spells.description: Falling debris rains from the ceiling, inflicting $s1 Nature damage to players within $A1 yards of each impact location.
spells.name: Falling Rubble

spells.description: The Restless Heart fires an arrow at a location in its chamber, inflicting $734277s1 Nature damage to players within $734277A1 yards of impact and forming $@spellname468442.
spells.name: Bullseye Windblast

spells.coaching_note: An expanding ring of wind — touching it is a big hit + 4s stun. Dodge it by getting launched airborne with Turbulent Arrows (they knock players up when touched) so the ring passes under you.
spells.description: A ring of violent wind expands, inflicting $s1 Nature damage every $t1 sec to players who touch it and stunning them for $d.
spells.name: Billowing Wind

spells.description: The Restless Heart shoots a rain of arrows, inflicting $472634s1 Nature damage to players within $472634A1 yards of each impact and forming $@spellname472635.
spells.name: Arrow Rain

spells.coaching_note: Knocks the primary target and applies a +40% Physical damage-taken debuff — the follow-up physical hits land amplified (the tank mitigates the window).
spells.description:
The Restless Heart knocks away its primary target, inflicting $s1 Physical damage and increasing their Physical damage taken by $s3% for $d.

Afterward, The Restless Heart fires a $@spellname1253986.
spells.name: Tempest Slash

spells.description: The Restless Heart fires a salvo of arrows towards a player for $d, inflicting $472672s1 Nature damage every $t1 sec to players in a frontal cone.
spells.name: Bolt Gale

spells.description:
Stormy energy lashes outward when the Restless Heart leaps, inflicting $s1 Nature damage to all players and an additional $1283371s2 Nature damage every $t2 sec.

Contacting $@spellname1253977 removes this affliction.
spells.name: Squall Leap

spells.description:
The windy arrow detonates upon contact with a player, inflicting $s2 Nature damage and knocking them upwards.

The detonation removes $@spellname1216042$?diff23|diff8[, forming a $@spellname1282932.][.]
spells.name: Turbulent Arrows

spells.description:
The Restless Heart marks players with wind-infused arrows. After $1253979d, the arrows unleash a wind gust, inflicting $1253978s1 Nature damage to players within $1253978A1 yards and an additional $1253978s2 Nature damage every $1253978t2 sec for $1253978d.$?diff8|diff23[

The wind gust destroys any $@spellname1282932 hit.][]
spells.name: Gust Shot

spells.description: A stormy spirit inflicts $1282955s1 Nature damage to players standing within its storm pool every $1282955t1 sec. $@spellname1253986 quells these spirits.
spells.name: Storming Soulfont

spells.description: The caster spits fireballs at a player for $d, inflicting $1266745s1 Fire damage every $t1 sec.
spells.name: Fire Spit

group_buffs.name: Hunter's Mark
group_buffs.note: Hunter's Mark — +3% damage taken from ALL schools (the broadest raid debuff), for the whole encounter.

movement_freedom.name: Disengage
movement_freedom.note: Requires the Posthaste talent — Disengage then frees ALL movement-impairing effects.
